query: L'Eroica gran fondo cycling Gaiole in Chianti

videos.title: Torna L’Eroica a Gaiole in Chianti: paesaggi, ciclismo ed eleganza
videos.description: Domenica 7 ottobre settemila ciclisti inforcheranno la loro bicicletta vintage sulle più belle strade bianche della Toscana

videos.title: Gran Fondo L'Eroica - The Italian Job Recon DVDs
videos.description:
GRAN FONDO RECON DVDs:
http://bit.ly/cyclefilmshop

FOLLOW ON TWITTER:
http://twitter.com/cyclefilm

TO TRY IT WOULD BE CRAZY!
TO DO IT WOULD BE IMPOSSIBLE!
Are you ready to take on half a dozen of the hardest, meanest and toughest Gran Fondos Italy has on offer?

Cyclefilm will once again show you the way with a full route reconnaissance of six legendary events:
1. L'Eroica Cicloturistica
2. Nove Colli
3. Giro di Lombardia
4. Marco Pantani
5. Pinarello
6. Campagnolo/Sportful

Together with luxury cycling holiday operator LA FUGA, follow us from the beautiful shores of Lake Como to the stunning peaks of the Dolomites, onto the rolling hills of Tuscany and down to the sandy beaches of Emilia Romagna.

ARE YOU IN OR OUT?

BOOK YOUR GRAN FONDO ADVENTURE WITH LA FUGA!
http://www.lafuga.cc

For more inspiring cycling films, visit:
http://cyclefilm.com

Video produced by CYCLEFILM, a European based production company specializing in informative cycling documentaries, how-to ride and reconnaissance films as well as news gathering from cycling events and trade shows around the world.

Don't Dream it, Do it - Cyclefilm Founder/Director Markus Neuert

videos.title: L'Eroica 2016   Gaiole in Chianti - Official Video
EROICA: IL PERCORSO LUNGO.
videos.description: L'Eroica di Gaiole, la ciclostorica per eccellenza. Qui, nella XX edizione del 2016, mi ritovai a pedalare la strada più lunga. Ecco la mia soggettiva, un POV, come si dice oggi.

videos.title: L'Eroica 2019, Gaiole in Chianti
videos.description: L'Eroica 2019, set in the beautiful countryside of Tuscany.  This annual vintage bike ride is held on the first Sunday of the month of October, and requires riders to ride vintage pre 1987 bicycles and wear period cycling clothes.  This challenging ride takes in the gravely white roads of Tuscany, the Strada Bianche and has lots of hills!
